commit_message:
Controller reset fix for some games that need a particular reset routine (Samurai Shodown) Controller reset fix for some games that need a particular reset routine (Samurai Shodown) Hello folks! This is my very first FPGA work. Thanks to @birdybro for pointing out the issue and answering my questions.

This PR addresses #197. After playing certain games (like Micro Machines), loading Samurai Shodown will result in the game being unplayable due to not accepting any controller inputs. 

Since
